ValidationRule.description: Ensures that when the Credit Note Max Timing in D+ field is populated, it follows the required format: a number followed by "D" (calendar days) or "BD" (business days), e.g. 30D or 10BD.
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Enter a number followed by "D" (calendar days) or "BD" (business days), e.g. 30D or 10BD.
